reviews.review_description: Very good graphics, very smooth gameplay loved it, play car racing game

Paid $2.99 for a MENU of cars you can PURCHASE in order to drive. It's the ONLY way to try it to see if it's worth any future purchases. Just be honest and include at least 1 car to try it. Until then, STAY AWAY. Oh yeah, NO REFUNDS. I fall within ALL the criteria for a refund, but NOPE, still won't refund. It took me about 3 minutes to realize it was a scam, not "more than 2 hours". I purchased the game yesterday, not "more than 14 days ago".
I tried to get more coins to buy a new car but once I bought it for 0.99$ it just didn't give me anything. This was a scam for both in app purchases and the game it's self

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your experience, but we want to clarify that there is no known issue with in-app purchases in the game. Purchases are working correctly for other players as well.
Sometimes purchases can be delayed due to store or network issues. If the item was charged but not delivered, it can usually be restored by restarting the game or using the Restore Purchases option (if available).
Please contact our support team with your purchase receipt so we can investigate and help you properly.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Really impressed with how realistic the driving feels! The car handling, sound and interior details make it feel like a true simulator. Perfect for anyone who enjoys realistic driving experience

The game looks horrible i look at the preview its a##
what a waste of money

developer_response.body: We’re sorry for the experience. We’re actively working on improving game quality and visuals in upcoming updates. Your feedback is appreciated and helps us make the game better.
